message:
fix: retry empty/null model responses with steering nudge

gpt-5.3-codex sometimes returns content:null (empty response with no
text and no tool calls), killing sessions mid-progress. This adds retry
logic: inject a user-role steering message and retry up to 3 times.
Counter resets when the model produces tool calls (real progress).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
